test.command: cd frontend && bun test; cd backend && cargo test

typecheck.command: cd frontend && npm run check; cd backend && cargo check

blockingIssues.description: Sidebar extraction acceptance criteria not satisfied in reviewed commit: core sidebar state/behavior remains in frontend/src/routes/+page.svelte instead of being moved out as required by the feature contract.
No recorded evidence that selecting a search result navigates correctly; verification only showed query entry and popover visibility.
Queue-to-workspace verification did not demonstrate required video context preservation (captured URL showed channel only).
Highlights-to-workspace deep-link verification (channel + video + content mode) was not evidenced.
Chat flow verification missed a required step: no evidence that a message was sent and a streaming response rendered.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify expected procedure for pre-implemented or verification-only features and define when strict RED-phase failing tests are required vs. when evidence-focused validation is acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple frontend-arch reviews reported process mismatch: frontend-extract-sidebar noted pre-implemented verification-only completion ambiguity; frontend-extract-search-guide and frontend-finalize-code-splitting both flagged RED guidance mismatch for refactor/verification-oriented work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance that feature commits and handoffs must remain tightly feature-scoped and that handoff commit IDs must point to implementation commits (not docs-only follow-ups).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-extract-sidebar review found unrelated route/shared-state edits bundled into the feature commit; frontend-extract-search-guide review found handoff commitId referencing docs commit 7bef9ee while implementation lived in d753e1a.

rejectedObservations.observation: Architecture docs are stale because they still describe +page.svelte as ~2200 lines.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected as inaccurate: current file length remains ~2200 lines and the architecture note already reflects current extracted components/lazy-loading state.

rejectedObservations.observation: RED-phase mismatch in svelte-frontend-worker skill (duplicate report from frontend-finalize-code-splitting).
